text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
150 
INSULIN_INPP_COPAY_1M 
LABEL: 
Insulin Copay Split Network Preferred Retail — One-Month Supply 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-payment amount for a one-month supply of the insulin drugs 
on this tier, using an in-network preferred pharmacy (INPP; also known as a preferred pharmacy 
within a split network). 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
12 
SOURCE: 
CMS
